technical.body: MSFT $82.9B revenue +18% / Azure +40% / AI run-rate $37B (+123%) / capex >$40B forward; GOOGL $109.9B +22% / Cloud $20B +63% / shares +6% AH; META -7% AH on capex shortfall + user-growth disappointment; AMZN beat/missed mixed; AAPL prints Apr 30 after-close — — Microsoft cloud revenue rose 29% to $54.5B, AI annual run rate hit $37B (+123% YoY). Alphabet net income surged 81% to $62.6B (mostly $37.7B unrealized equity gains, not core ops). Meta slid 7% AH on Q1 capex below expectations + user-growth miss. AAPL Q2 FY26 consensus EPS $1.95 / rev $109.7B (iPhone ~$56.5B, Services ~$30B); JP Morgan high-side $112.7B / iPhone $59.5B. Tim Cook → Executive Chair Sept 1, John Ternus succeeds.

rates held 3.50–3.75%, but 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992): Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion; Powell delivered final press conference but said he'll remain on Board of Governors until Trump-admin Fed investigation reaches "transparency and finality"; Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking — S&P 7,135.95 (-0.04%), Nasdaq 24,673.24 (+0.04%), Dow 48,861.81 (-0.57%); Mideast war added to FOMC statement as outlook risk — — The first 4-dissenter FOMC since Greenspan-era 1992. Powell-staying-on-Board is the structural surprise: his term as Chair ends May 15 but Board seat runs to 2028; he's keeping it as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation.

CISA KEV adds CVE-2024-1708 ConnectWise ScreenConnect + CVE-2026-32202 Windows Shell (May-12 federal deadline) Apr 28; CVE-2026-40967 Spring AI FilterExpressionConverter injection (CVSS 8.6, Apr 28) hits the LLM-vector-DB query layer; CVE-2026-3854 GitHub Enterprise Server RCE (CVSS 8.7, Apr 28) — single git push to any repo executes arbitrary commands; CVE-2026-34965 Cockpit CMS authenticated RCE (CVSS 8.8, Apr 29); SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (9.8) still unpatched 11+ days post-disclosure — — Spring AI is the first 2026 CVE squarely in the LLM-tooling supply chain (FilterExpressionConverter doesn't escape keys/values when translating filter expressions to vector-store query languages — direct injection at the RAG query plane). GitHub Enterprise RCE forced both GitHub.com and GHES into emergency patching.

citations.label: CISA - Adds Two Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog (Apr 28)

technical.body: Novita Sandbox launch (Apr 28: Firecracker microVM, sub-200ms cold-start, ~1s state-checkpoint resume, OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent-runtime targets); AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime adds Node.js Apr 28; Multica v0.2.19 (Apr 28) + v0.2.20 (Apr 29 09:40 UTC); MITRE ATT&CK v19 lands Apr 28 splitting Defense Evasion (TA0005) into Stealth + Impair Defenses; v5.4 framework adds AI-agent context poisoning / tool invocation abuse / MCP server compromise / malicious agent deployment as named techniques — — Novita pitches itself as an E2B-compatible runtime with system-level isolation per agent task; pitched at the 55%-of-AI-agent-rollouts-delayed-for-security number Gartner is citing. ATT&CK v19 is the structural validation of the "agent-skills marketplace as attack surface" thesis from this report's prior-day Future section.

citations.label: PR Newswire - Novita AI Launches Sandbox to Secure OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, and Autonomous Systems

technical.body: Google Online Security Blog Apr documents +32% relative malicious-category increase Nov-2025 → Feb-2026 in observed payloads; researchers publish 10 fresh IPI payloads targeting financial fraud / data destruction / API-key theft; Forcepoint corroborates; 2604.24026 SSL representation (Apr 28) + 2604.23374 NeuroTaint information-flow tracking (Apr 24) frame the defensive countermove — — IPI delivery via 1-pixel hidden text, near-transparent color, hidden-tag CSS, HTML comment burying, and metadata payloads is now production-deployed against agentic-browser workflows. NeuroTaint is the first comprehensive taint-tracking framework purpose-built for LLM agents.

citations.label: Google Security Blog - AI threats in the wild: prompt injections on the web
